title: EVO-STIK Sticks Like Sh*t Adhesive White - 290ml - All Weather - Extreme Temperature & Movement Resistant
features: High performance grab adhesive that offers excellent initial grab and a high strength bond
The SM Polymer formulation can be used on almost all building materials and is both weatherproof and water resistant… it’ll even stick to wet surfaces
Solvent free and suitable for interior and exterior use
Suitable materials: Wood, metal, glass, stone, plastics, polystyrene, concrete, tiles, mirrors, plasterboard and more
Contents: 1x EVO-STIK Sticks Like Sh*t Adhesive, All Weather, Extreme Temperature & Movement Resistant, Colour: White, Size: 290ml
description: EVO-STIK Sticks Like Sh*t Adhesive is a high performance, solvent free adhesive that offers excellent initial grab and a high strength bond. It can be used on most building materials including wood, concrete, brick, plaster, glass, ceramics, metals, rigid PVC, grp, insulation boards, foam polystyrene and more... it'll even stick to wet surfaces! EVO-STIK Sticks Like Sh*t Adhesive will resist extreme temperatures and movement and can be used in both interior and exterior applications.
